title: RAM-USB Metrics Overview
description: MT-F-04's three required dashboard panels (response time, throughput, active connections), each split per service via the "metric" column - queries the same "metrics" hypertable services/metrics-collector/migrations/000001_create_metrics_table.up.sql creates. JSON has no comment syntax, hence this field for the doc-comment context every other file in this project carries inline.

panels.title: Response time (MT-F-04)
panels.description: Average response time (ms), per service, per published interval - pkg/metrics.Payload.AverageResponseTimeMs.

targets.rawSql: SELECT time AS "time", service AS "metric", average_response_time_ms AS "value" FROM metrics WHERE $__timeFilter(time) ORDER BY time

panels.title: Throughput (MT-F-04)
panels.description: Requests handled per published interval, per service - pkg/metrics.Payload.RequestCount.

targets.rawSql: SELECT time AS "time", service AS "metric", request_count AS "value" FROM metrics WHERE $__timeFilter(time) ORDER BY time

panels.title: Active connections (MT-F-04)
panels.description: Point-in-time open-connection count at publish time, per service - pkg/metrics.Payload.ActiveConnections.

targets.rawSql: SELECT time AS "time", service AS "metric", active_connections AS "value" FROM metrics WHERE $__timeFilter(time) ORDER BY time
